title: aditya.mandavi 9d When an update is made on a ‘Text’ column of an item, the event does not appear on the board activity log. Is there a way updates on ‘Text’ columns can be tracked?

When an update is made on a ‘Text’ column of an item, the event does not appear on the board activity log. Is there a way updates on ‘Text’ columns can be tracked?
